## Review checklist

- [ ] Changes are consistent with the architecture principles in [DOC-001](../docs/phase-1-foundations/DOC-001_Architecture_Vision_Goals.md)
- [ ] Any new architectural decisions are captured as an ADR in [DOC-023](../docs/phase-7-governance/DOC-023_Architecture_Decision_Records.md)
- [ ] Cross-references to other documents are correct and use relative links
- [ ] YAML front-matter `status` field updated if document progresses from DRAFT → APPROVED
- [ ] CODEOWNERS-required reviewers added

## Security impact

- [ ] This change has no security implications
- [ ] This change affects security controls — CISO review requested
